task_completion.description: Verify that the data from MeasurementData.csv is loaded into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP data view showing the loaded dataset with columns such as Part, Operator, and Measurement.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Gauge R&R analysis is initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP analysis panel displays 'Gauge R&R' or 'Crossed Gauge R&R' settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the variables are correctly assigned to their respective roles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis panel, 'Measurement' is assigned to the Measurement/Response field, 'Part' to the Part field, and 'Operator' to the Operator/Appraiser field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the graph of variation components is included in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox for variation components graph is selected in the analysis options, or the 'Components of Variation' graph is visible in the JASP results pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JASP project is saved as GaugeStudy.jasp in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/JASP/GaugeStudy.jasp, or the JASP window title bar displaying 'GaugeStudy.jasp'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JASP application window being interacted with, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Verify that the analysis results are genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane in JASP displays properly formatted statistical tables and plots characteristic of JASP's output engine.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing commands to create, download, or manipulate the .jasp file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/GaugeStudy.jasp. The data path is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MeasurementData.csv. Note that the JASP UI might label the analysis simply as 'Gauge R&R' under Quality Control or MSA. The VLM should verify the visual presence of the analysis, variable assignments, and the variation components graph in the JASP GUI, ignoring any internal JSON key mismatches.
